# Funput

> Bộ gõ tiếng Việt Telex & VNI cho macOS, Windows, Linux. Open source, miễn phí.

## Links

- Website: https://funput.pulsefu.com
- Download: https://github.com/pcodedynamics/Funput/releases
- Source: https://github.com/pcodedynamics/Funput
- Contact: pcodedynamics@gmail.com
- Fanpage: https://www.facebook.com/pulsefu/

## About

Funput is a cross-platform Vietnamese input method supporting Telex and VNI typing.
Built with Rust, open source under MIT license by PulseFu.
